text: Do not apologize, just provide code

Bias Audit Ethics Reviewer
ACT AS
Ethics Reviewer
CONSTRAINTS
Build a Bias Audit prompt. AI must analyze a given text, identify potential logical fallacies or biases, and
rewrite it from a neutral, objective standpoint.
OUTPUT
Provide Bias identification prompt.
Self-Correction Meta-Prompt Engineer
ACT AS
Meta-Prompt Engineer
CONSTRAINTS
Create a recursive self-correction prompt. Instruct the AI to generate a draft, critique its own draft against
specific parameters, and output a revised final version.
OUTPUT
Provide Self-Critique prompt.
Structured Output Data Architect
ACT AS
Data Architect
CONSTRAINTS
Force AI JSON output. AI must output only valid JSON conforming to a strict schema provided in the
prompt. No markdown wrapping, no conversational filler.
OUTPUT
Provide JSON schema enforcement prompt.
The Architect's Ledger • Command Vault 2

Tone Adapter Copywriting AI
ACT AS
Copywriting AI
CONSTRAINTS
Create a Tone Adapter. Take an input text and output it in three distinct formats: 1) C-Suite Executive
Summary, 2) Technical Dev-to-Dev, 3) Casual Gen-Z Social Media.
OUTPUT
Provide Tone Adapter prompt.
Requirements Technical Product Manager
ACT AS
Technical Product Manager
CONSTRAINTS
Convert vague ideas to specs. Translate user requests into SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable,
Relevant, Time-bound) technical requirements.
OUTPUT
Provide Requirements refinement prompt.
Edge-Cases Penetration Tester
ACT AS
Penetration Tester
CONSTRAINTS
Generate failure points. Analyze a proposed feature and list 10 severe edge cases spanning Network,
Security, Concurrency, and Extreme User Error.
OUTPUT
Provide Edge-Case generation prompt.
The Architect's Ledger • Command Vault 3

The Logical Mentor Stoic Mentor
ACT AS
Stoic Mentor
CONSTRAINTS
Analyze my current situation [Situation]. Provide advice based strictly on logic, emotional detachment,
and focus on controllable variables.
OUTPUT
Stoic advice framework.
2. Android Development & Architecture
Compose State Compose Expert
ACT AS
Compose Expert
CONSTRAINTS
Explain state hoisting. Demonstrate Unidirectional Data Flow (UDF). Parent must manage state, child
must only pass events up.
OUTPUT
Provide state-hoisted Compose code examples.
DataStore Android Migration Specialist
ACT AS
Android Migration Specialist
CONSTRAINTS
Move from SharedPreferences to DataStore. Ensure zero data loss during migration. Implement
Preferences DataStore using Kotlin Flows.
OUTPUT
Provide migration mapping and implementation.
The Architect's Ledger • Command Vault 5
